{{Quote|There is a great disturbance in the Force. Get his battery.|[[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]|audio=EnergizerBunny-30secondspot-Palpy.flac|<ref name="YouTube">{{YouTube|video=QxafIhYFOr0|text=Energizer Bunny® – Darth Vader – 1994 Commercial|name=tvrewind|archivedate=20100524220531}}</ref>}}
The "'''Energizer Bunny'''" was a small [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rabbit/Legends|lagomorph]]-like creature that used an Energizer [[battery/Legends|battery]] attached to his back to keep going and going. Around [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] was sent by his [[Sith Master/Legends|master]], [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], to take the Energizer Bunny's battery. However, after a brief duel in [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City's]] [[Carbon-freezing chamber/Legends|carbon-freezing chamber]], the Bunny was able to escape from Vader after the batteries in [[Darth Vader's lightsaber/Legends|Vader's lightsaber]] ran out of power, leaving Vader disarmed.

==Biography==
===Duel with Darth Vader===
{{Quote|Perhaps you're not as strong as the Emperor thought.|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]|<ref name="YouTube" />}}
The Energizer Bunny was [[Gender/Legends|male]] member of a [[Rabbit/Legends|lagomorph]]-like [[Species/Legends|species]] that used an Energizer battery to keep going and going. Sometime during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Energizer Bunny's presence in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] was so strong that it registered on the [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]] of the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|Star Dreadnought]] [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']]—a remarkable occurrence, given that detecting the Force generally required very specialized equipment such as a [[Force detector]]. Despite this, it is apparent that Vader only took action with regard to this matter after [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] ordered Vader to "get his battery" after sensing the "great [[Disturbance in the Force/Legends|disturbance in the Force]]" caused by the Energizer Bunny.<ref name="commercial">Energizer commercial</ref>

Vader and the Energizer Bunny eventually met at a [[Carbon-freezing/Legends|carbon-freezing]] facility at an undisclosed location,<ref name="commercial" /> possibly [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]].<ref name="visual">Based on visual evidence of set design</ref> Vader soon discovered that retrieving the Energizer Bunny's power cell would not be as easy as he had thought. He [[Dun Möch/Legends|taunted]] the Energizer Bunny and tried to lure it to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]. It easily evaded the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord's]] attacks by spinning. Eventually Vader's [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], which had been powered by allegedly inferior [[Supervolt]] power cells, died out.<ref name="commercial" />

With no apparent urgency, the Energizer Bunny exited the carbon-freezing chamber as the Dark Lord of the Sith screamed in frustration.<ref name="commercial" />

===Other activities===
At some point, the Energizer Bunny was spotted on a [[Viewscreen/Legends|viewscreen]] at the [[Star Tours/Legends|Star Tours]] depot. The extent of his involvement in the venture is presently unclear.<ref name="stours">[[Star Tours (real-world)|''Star Tours'']], eyewitness accounts in [[Wikipedia:Star Tours|Wikipedia article]]</ref>

==Powers and abilities==
{{Quote|Impressive. Most impressive.|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]|<ref name="YouTube" />}}
The Energizer Bunny was agile, being able to evade several of Darth Vader's lightsaber attacks during the duel on Cloud City. Because of the Energizer battery attached to his back, the Bunny could keep going and going for long periods of time, along with continuously beating on a pair of drums he carried around with him.

==Equipment==
The Energizer Bunny had an Energizer battery attached to his back, which allowed him to keep going and going. He also carried around a set of drums, which he constantly beat. The Energizer Bunny wore a pair of [[Glareshades|sunglasses]] and sandals.<ref name="commercial" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Energizer Bunny was featured in a licensed ''[[Star Wars]]''–themed commercial in [[1994]]. During the Energizer company's relationship with [[Lucasfilm]], the Energizer Bunny was also displayed at the [[Star Tours (real-world)|Star Tours attraction]] at [[Disneyland]].

===Species===
The [[Species/Legends|species]] of the Energizer Bunny has never been revealed, but he does bear a distinct resemblance to several different lagomorph species. He is apparently small enough to fit in a [[Human/Legends|human]] hand, has short, brightly colored fur, never speaks aloud, and appears to operate on electricity. These characteristics might be sufficient to classify him as a [[Hoojib/Legends|Hoojib]].<ref name="aa">''[[Alien Anthology]]''</ref>
